steps.title: Use the revealing clue
steps.content: The passage says KNM-KP 271 can reveal important details about the Pliocene epoch. The blank needs a word meaning clarify or shed light on that period.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A means copy. Choice B means plan or create. Choice D means replace. The needed word means make clearer by revealing details. The answer is C.
